description: Reminds users to take a short break to avoid eye strain
body: # 20 20 20 A fork of [Sk1er's original mod](https://github.com/Sk1erLLC/20-20-20) utilizing OneConfig. Configurable via OneConfig. This fork and the original mod are licensed under the MIT License. ### Differences - Add custom color support for the GUI - Improve config - Fix partially off screen GUI elements ### Why a Fork? Sk1erLLC has been inactive for several years at this point outside of one of their mods Patcher, which still rarely updates. A user asked for this mod to be updated and fixed up, and since Sk1erLLC is not planning on keeping this mod up to date, I forked it. If Sk1erLLC ever comes back to creating and updating their mods I will PR the changes I've made here. ### Modpack? You may use this mod as the license allows.
